india_trends.title: Small-cap stock under ₹50 MIC Electronics jumps 10% following stock market rally
india_trends.summary: MIC Electronics shares rose nearly 9% on April 29, driven by strong domestic equities. The company reported a Q4 net loss of ₹18.35 crore, largely due to a one-time tax adjustment, despite a 13.3% revenue increase and improved operational performance.

india_trends.title: Vedanta demerger: Last day to buy shares today for eligibility ahead of demerger record date
india_trends.summary: Vedanta is also nearing its demerger record date of 1 May 2026. As there is a stock market holiday on May 1, Vedanta shares will trade ex-demerger on April 30, Thursday. Therefore, today is the last day to buy Vedanta shares to avail the demerger benefits, on account of the T+1 settlement cycle.

india_trends.title: Neo Alternative Asset Managers hits ₹1,500 crore first close for ₹5,000 crore Infra Income Fund II
india_trends.summary: Neo Alternative Asset Managers has successfully raised ₹1,500 crore for its second infrastructure income fund. The fund will invest in de-risked infrastructure assets like roads and renewable energy platforms. This strategy aims to provide investors with stable yields and capital preservation. Inves

india_trends.title: Mint Explainer | Vedanta F&O contracts expire today ahead of demerger. What happens next?
india_trends.summary: Vedanta Ltd is restructuring into five independent companies. This move, aimed at value unlocking, will disrupt the derivatives market temporarily, with all futures and options contracts expiring on April 29.

india_trends.title: Bitcoin consolidates near $77K ahead of Fed decision; $80K breakout could trigger $1.2B short squeeze
india_trends.summary: Bitcoin consolidated near the $77,000 mark on Wednesday ahead of the US Fed's rate decision, while experts believe that the next key trigger might be the April CPI report. The cryptocurrency was trading at the $77,159 mark.

india_trends.title: OnEMI Technology IPO opens tomorrow: GMP, price band, and Analyst view
india_trends.summary: OnEMI Technology Solutions' Rs 925.92 crore IPO opens April 30, closing May 5, with a price band of Rs 162-171. The digital lending platform, operating under Kissht and Ring, aims to strengthen its subsidiary's capital base. The issue shows modest grey market interest, trading at a Rs 4 premium.
